spec.title: Tracked Process Groups
spec.description: Number of distinct tracked executable groups exported by the low-cardinality process scraper.

spec.title: Process CPU by Name
spec.description: CPU utilization for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Process RSS by Name
spec.description: Resident memory for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Process Virtual Memory by Name
spec.description: Virtual memory footprint for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Process Threads by Name
spec.description: Thread counts for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Process Open FDs by Name
spec.description: Open file descriptors for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Process Uptime by Name
spec.description: Uptime for the selected tracked executables.

spec.title: Top CPU Now
spec.description: Current CPU utilization ranking for tracked executables.

spec.title: Top RSS Now
spec.description: Current resident memory ranking for tracked executables.

spec.title: Top Threads Now
spec.description: Current thread-count ranking for tracked executables.

spec.title: Top Open FDs Now
spec.description: Current open-file-descriptor ranking for tracked executables.

spec.title: Running Processes
spec.description: Current running process count across the workstation.

spec.title: Process State Share
spec.description: Current process-state distribution as a proportional snapshot.

spec.title: Sleeping Processes
spec.description: Current sleeping process count across the workstation.

spec.title: Zombie Processes
spec.description: Current zombie process count across the workstation.

spec.title: Top CPU Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently consuming the most CPU.

spec.title: Top RSS Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently consuming the most resident memory.

spec.title: Top Threads Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently carrying the largest thread count.

spec.title: Top Open FDs Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently holding the most open file descriptors.

spec.title: Process States Over Time
spec.description: Process state counts over time for the entire machine.
